2026-05-07 - api-003 REST rate limits and API version headers

- Completed `api-003` as the first `build_pass:false` PRD feature: REST responses now carry GitHub-compatible `X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`, `X-RateLimit-Reset`, `X-RateLimit-Used`, `X-RateLimit-Resource`, and `X-GitHub-Api-Version-Selected` headers, with `/rate_limit` and `/api/rate_limit` exposing current bucket state.
- Added migration `202605070009_api_rate_limits` for an unlogged `rate_limit_buckets` table keyed by subject type/key, resource, and window start, with per-resource indexes and updated-at trigger.
- Added cross-cutting Axum middleware that classifies `core` vs `search`, uses bearer token hashes, signed session IDs, or anonymous forwarded IPs as subjects, applies 5000/hour authenticated core, 60/hour anonymous core, and 30/minute search limits, and returns a stable `403 rate_limited` error envelope on overage.
- Added API version selection from `X-GitHub-Api-Version`, defaulting to `2022-11-28`, and documented the contract on `/docs/api`.
- Verification passed: focused `cargo test -p opengithub-api --test api_rate_limits_contract -- --nocapture`; focused `cd web && npx vitest run tests/api-docs.test.tsx`; web TypeScript; full `TEST_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres@localhost:55432/opengithub_identity_test DB_SSL=false CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 make check`; full `DB_SSL=false CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 make test` with Cargo tests plus 643 web tests. 2026-04-30 - git-001 phase 2 private fetch auth

- Implemented Phase 2 from `.qrspi/git-001/structure.md`: private repository clone/fetch now works for authorized users through signed Rust session cookies and personal access tokens.
- Added `crates/api/src/domain/tokens.rs` for PAT verification against stored `sha256:` hashes with prefix lookup, expiry/revocation filtering, repo read scope checks, and `last_used_at` updates.
- Threaded optional Git actors through `git-upload-pack` smart HTTP discovery and fetch execution; public repositories still clone anonymously, while private repositories require a readable actor.
- Added Basic/Bearer credential parsing and `WWW-Authenticate: Basic realm="opengithub Git"` challenges so standard `http://user:token@host/{owner}/{repo}.git` clone URLs retry with credentials.
- Expanded `crates/api/tests/git_transport.rs` to cover session-cookie private advertisement, valid PAT private advertisement, real private `git clone` against an Axum server, token usage timestamp updates, invalid/expired/unscoped token denial, and no token/hash leakage in error bodies.
- Verification: `TEST_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/opengithub_identity_test cargo test --test git_transport -- --nocapture` passed; `TEST_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/opengithub_identity_test make check` passed; `TEST_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/opengithub_identity_test make test` passed with 72 frontend tests plus cargo tests; `TEST_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/opengithub_identity_test make test-e2e` passed with 29 Playwright tests.

2026-05-03 - packages-003 phase 1 OCI registry manifest reads

- Completed Phase 1 from `.qrspi/packages-003/structure.md`: opengithub now exposes a minimal Docker Registry HTTP API v2 read surface without marking `packages-003.build_pass=true`.
- Added additive migration `202605032020_package_registry_manifest_reads` for package version manifest media type, config digest, manifest byte size, manifest digest index, and redaction-safe `package_registry_audit_events`.
- Added `crates/api/src/domain/packages_registry.rs` with OCI namespace/image/reference validation, digest parsing, manifest media-type negotiation, PAT Basic/Bearer auth resolution, `packages:read` scope enforcement, package visibility/permission checks, private package redaction, and manifest read audit rows.
